eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: Vermont; at 10:49 AM on AUG 23, 2019 Effective until 12:49 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is a TEST of the Vermont BLUE Alert notification system.  This is a TEST of the Vermont BLUE Alert notification system.  Only a test. 

-       On Friday, August 23rd at approximately 9:30 am a Vermont law enforcement officer was shot and killed near Pond Road in the Town of Amsterdam in France County, Vermont
 
-       by John S Doe in blue 2007 Honda Civic with Vermont registration A B C 1 2 3 4.

-       Suspect John S Doe is described as a white male approximately 5 feet, 9 inches tall, 160 pounds with brown eyes and brown hair and was last seen wearing blue jeans, a grey Patagonia T-Shirt, dark-colored sneakers, and a black baseball hat.
 
-       If the suspect and or vehicle is encountered DO NOT make contact.  Call 9 1 1.
